title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer’s billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets an 'Upload failed' error.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving email notifications for ticket updates.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer reports that the password reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Subscription Plan Not Updated
description: Customer upgraded their subscription but the dashboard still shows the old plan.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Customer reports that the dashboard takes more than 20 seconds to load.

title: Data Sync Issue
description: Customer’s data is not syncing between mobile and web applications.

title: Error 500 on Reports Page
description: Customer encounters a 500 server error when trying to access the reports section.

title: Unable to Add New Team Member
description: Admin user cannot add a new team member due to permission error.
